_publications._publicationTitle: The development of an artificial intelligence auto-segmentation tool for 3D volumetric analysis of vestibular schwannomas.

_contextSnippet: The use of this AI will enable faster 3D volumetric analysis compared to manual segmentation. The tool will be a method of assessing tumor growth through volume measurements and allow clinicians to make more informed decisions.
details: Enables faster 3D volumetric analysis compared to manual segmentation and allows for more informed clinical decision making
